hero.subtitle: Train your brain to calculate the day of the week for any date in history.

practice.title: Practice Mode
practice.desc: The core of Weekdle. We give you a random date, and you guess the day of the week as fast as you can.

learn.title: Learn the Method
learn.desc: Don't just guess! Visit the Information page to learn the 'Doomsday Algorithm' and solve any date in seconds.

solver.title: Date Solver
solver.desc: Need to check a specific date? Use the solver to see the step-by-step breakdown of the calculation.
